user_prompt: Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
actual_output:
Absolutely — here’s a more empathetic draft you can use before escalating:

---

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry this has been such a frustrating experience. I understand why you’d be upset, especially after already spending time trying to get this resolved.

I want to make sure we give this one more careful look before moving things further. Based on what you’ve shared so far, here’s what I’d like to try next:

1. [Step or action you want them to take]
2. [What you’ll check or confirm on your side]
3. [Expected result or what to send back if it doesn’t work]

If this still doesn’t solve it, I’ll make sure we get the right team involved with the full context so you don’t have to repeat everything again.

Thanks for your patience — I know this isn’t ideal, and I appreciate you giving us another chance to help.

Best,  
[Your Name / Support Team]

---

If you share the customer’s last message or the issue type, I can make it more specific and tailor the tone to the situation.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly followed the user's instruction to draft a more empathetic response and offered further customization based on the specific context.
